summary: Iteration 2 full test of Startup Master — tap-to-code, gem shop, new sticky tutorial, harder economy, taxes, mute. Backend pytest (6/6 pass): health + 4 event-generation scenarios (IT/EN viral_trend, market_crash, unknown-type fallback) via Emergent LLM key. Frontend (mobile 390x844) full fresh-start tutorial flow verified: initial cash=€800 & hype=35%, step0 tap-office-5x advances to step1 (counter shows 'taps left'), sticky tutorial-overlay uses position:fixed top:8px zIndex:65 (NOT blocking), buy-desk step1→2 (cash −121 incl. ~1s burn, desks=1), hire-junior step2→3 (cash −200), launch Hello World step3→4 (activeProject workTarget=50), 55 rapid taps step4→5 releases app and hides tutorial overlay. Gem shop opens via shop-btn and stat-gems, close via gem-shop-close works. Mute toggles without error. Lang toggle switches EN↔IT and persists across tab switches. Zero console errors throughout full flow.
critical_code_review_comments: gemShop.js defines 7 GEM_ITEMS but 'revive' is filtered by onlyWhen(bankrupt); shop renders 6 in normal play. Problem statement said '7 items' — the hidden behavior is correct by design but worth documenting in UX spec.

useGameState.js tick(): periodic tax multiplies cash by 0.92 each 90s — still uses prev.activeEvents inside revenuePerSec but already filtered `activeEvents` exists in scope; consider passing the filtered list for consistency. Currently cosmetic.

useGameState.js tapCode: when completing the active project via taps, `sfx.release()` runs but the return object keeps `activeEvents: prev.activeEvents` un-aged; this is fine, but the tick path also increments app age — could double-count on the same second. Minor.
GamePage.jsx: bankrupt overlay is inline JSX; consider extracting to its own component for testability and split of concerns. File ~193 lines — still within guideline.
server.py deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers (noted in iter 1).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tutorial + gem shop + mute + lang flows green)

seed_data_creation: None — localStorage cleared at start of each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile viewport 390x844 used. After fresh localStorage clear, initial snapshot is cash=800/hype=35/tutorialStep=0. Save key is 'startup_master_save_v1'. Tutorial steps: 0=tap5x, 1=desk, 2=hire, 3=launch, 4=auto-wait/tap-finish, 5=done(overlay removed). Observed state during flow: buy-desk cost 120 (cash 800→678.5 incl. ~1-2s burn at 1€/s), hire-junior cost 200, launch Hello World cost 0 (cash stayed 478.5). After 55 iso-tap-zone clicks at workTarget=50, Hello World released; gems bumped to 20 via milestone rewards. Gem shop shows 6 items normally (7th 'revive' gated behind bankrupt). Lang toggle persists through tab switches. Console: 0 errors.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All specified acceptance criteria met.
